heading: Savings provision
label: 70206 Savings provision
text: Nothing in this subtitle provides additional authority to regulate or direct private activity on freight networks designated under this subtitle.
notes: Amendments2021— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 117–58section 70204 of this title
